name: Store Name Detection
description: Verifies that the store name was detected from the receipt

evidence.recommendation: Ensure the receipt image clearly shows the merchant name.

message: Store name could not be detected from receipt
recommendation: Ensure the receipt image clearly shows the merchant name.

name: Receipt Date Format
description: Validates that the receipt date follows DD/MM/YYYY format

evidence.recommendation: Check the date field in the receipt.

message: Date format is invalid. Expected DD/MM/YYYY.
recommendation: Check the date field in the receipt.

name: PPN 11% VAT Verification
description: Verifies PPN (11% VAT) is present for taxable transactions

evidence.recommendation: Indonesian tax regulation requires PPN 11% for taxable transactions.

message: PPN (11% VAT) is missing for a taxable transaction
recommendation: Indonesian tax regulation requires PPN 11% for taxable transactions.

name: Payment Method Detection
description: Verifies that the payment method was detected

evidence.recommendation: Payment method is useful for reconciliation.

recommendation: Payment method is useful for reconciliation.

name: Items Present
description: Verifies at least one item was detected on the receipt

evidence.recommendation: Ensure the receipt image clearly shows the item list.

recommendation: Ensure the receipt image clearly shows the item list.
